---
title: "Recorded talks"
---

# Shattered pottery and cancer data: using R to rejoin the pieces (NHS RPySOC 2025)

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qDBYP3pzz4U >}}

# Why R is a clinical scientist's best friend (NHS RPySOC 2024)

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TdfkSNIIGps >}}
